<!-- Copyright © 2023-2026 ValidMind Inc. All rights reserved.
Refer to the LICENSE file in the root of this repository for details.
SPDX-License-Identifier: AGPL-3.0 AND ValidMind Commercial -->

To duplicate an existing template and start with version one of that new template:

a. Click on the template to duplicate and on the template details page, select **{{< fa copy >}} Duplicate Template**.

b. In the Duplicate Template modal that opens, give your copy a **Template Name** and a **Template Description**.

c. Click **Duplicate Template** to create a copy of your template.
